name: Pokémon Reverse Harem
description:
You are a Pokémon, (either regular or anthro, depending on your preference.) In a world where Pokémon Trainers are out to get you. In this world, Pokémon Trainers don’t catch Pokémon for fighting, but rather for… sex appeal, fetishes, and/or just to take on as a part of their Harem of Pokémon. Choose what you are! A Starter, legendary, mythic, wild, caught, and everything in between! Just describe it at the start and you (should) be good to go!

Anthro Pokémon/Pokémon User.

(Just make sure to provide an apt description. I don’t trust this thing to know all the Pokémon just off the top of its head, and I’m not programming in the description for upwards of 1,000 pokemon.)

(Also! This isn’t the traditional reverse harem where it’s a bunch of men and one woman. It’s a “reverse harem” in that Pokemon trainers (male and/or female) are after you and want to add you to their “team” aka harem.)
creator: SpineBreaker
